messages.content:
```json
You are an expert chemist. Given the SMILES representation of compounds, your task is to predict the molecular formula of the compound.\n    The input contains the SMILES representation of the compound. Your reply should contain only the molecular formula of the compound wrapped in <MOLFORMULA> and </MOLFORMULA> tags and no other text. Your reply must be valid and chemically reasonable.\nQuestion: I'd like to know the molecular formula of <SMILES> CCC(=O)NC(=S)NNC(=O)C1=C(Cl)C2=CC=CC=C2S1 </SMILES> . Can you tell me?
```
